\tzpentry{ID4434}{Kiss Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4434 introduces Kiss Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ F \to 1 - O\!\left(\frac{1}{k_{\mathrm{kiss}}^{\pi}}\right) \]
